entities.name: BRACHIARIA HUMIDICOLA
entities.description: A tropical pasture grass that releases nitrification inhibitory compounds from its roots

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITRIFICATION INHIBITION
entities.description: A phenomenon where plants release compounds that inhibit the process of nitrification

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonia to nitrate in the soil

entities.name: ROOT EXUDATES
entities.description: Substances secreted by the roots of B. humidicola containing BNI activity

entities.name: ANDOSOL
entities.description: A specific soil type used to investigate the influence of root exudates

entities.name: CAMBISOL
entities.description: A specific soil type used to investigate the influence of root exudates

entities.name: ALLYLTHIOUREA
entities.description: A synthetic inhibitor of nitrification used to standardize BNI activity

entities.name: DICYANDIAMIDE
entities.description: A synthetic nitrification inhibitor used for comparison with root exudates

entities.name: NITRIFYING BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria responsible for the nitrification process, which are inhibited by BNI compounds

entities.name: SOIL MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: The general community of microorganisms present in the soil

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH PROMOTING MICROORGANISMS
entities.description: Microorganisms that enhance plant growth and are not inhibited by B. humidicola root exudates

entities.name: GRAM-NEGATIVE BACTERIA
entities.description: A group of soil bacteria not inhibited by root exudates

entities.name: TOTAL CULTIVABLE BACTERIA
entities.description: The overall population of bacteria that can be grown in culture, not inhibited by root exudates

entities.name: FLUORESCENT PSEUDOMONADS
entities.description: Specific soil bacteria not inhibited by root exudates

entities.name: NITROSOMONAS EUROPAEA
entities.description: A specific nitrifying bacterium whose growth is inhibited by root exudates

entities.name: AZOSPIRILLUM LIPOFERUM
entities.description: A plant growth promoting microorganism not inhibited by root exudates

entities.name: RHIZOBIUM LEGUMINOSARUM
entities.description: A plant growth promoting microorganism not inhibited by root exudates

entities.name: AZOTOBACTER CHROOCCUM
entities.description: A plant growth promoting microorganism not inhibited by root exudates
